LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Armor.label: Miraboreasu Armor
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Armor.description: Armor composed of dragon scales and bones worn by the Miraboreasu. It seems this is not equipment that can be crafted, but created by the dragon's own power.
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Base_Cloth.label: Casual Wear
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Base_Cloth.description: Clothes worn by the Miraboreasu for daily activities. Without any hindrance, the dragon can freely use its super-regeneration ability to heal its body. It seems this is not equipment that can be crafted, but created by the dragon's own power.
